parameters.jsCode:
const feeds = [
  'https://www.vintaliciously.de/feed',
  'https://www.vintage-kontor.com/blogs/vintage-blog.atom',
  'https://blog-dortmund.de/feed',
  'https://www.kurz-mal-weg.de/feed',
  'https://www.kulturfalter.de/feed',
  'https://www.feelslikehessen.de/feed',
  'https://upcyclingbylulu.wordpress.com/feed',
  'https://recyclingkunst.wordpress.com/feed',
  'https://greenmoxie.com/feed',
  'https://recreateddesigns.com/feed',
  'https://upcycledesignlab.com/feed',
  'https://victorias-vintage.co.uk/feed',
  'https://glamourdaze.com/feed',
  'https://whaelse.com/en/feed',
  'https://atomicredhead.com/feed',
  'https://calivintage.com/feed',
  'https://sustainabledeeds.com/feed',
  'https://thejunkmap.com.au/feed',
  'https://birdzofafeather.ca/web-stories/feed',
  'https://diyinspired.com/category/trash-to-treasure/feed'
];

const shuffled = feeds.sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
const selected = shuffled.slice(0, 5);
console.log('Selected ' + selected.length + ' feeds: ' + selected.join(', '));
return selected.map(url => ({ json: { feedUrl: url } }));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const mid = $('Build Post').first().json._featuredMediaId; return mid && mid > 0 ? JSON.stringify({ featured_media: mid }) : JSON.stringify({}); })() }}
